# dokku_app_scheduler (Resource)

Sets the scheduler used to deploy a Dokku app (`dokku scheduler:set`), e.g. docker-local or k3s.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String)
- `scheduler` (String) Scheduler to select for this app, e.g. docker-local, k3s.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
